zones.name: Lake Zone
zones.description: Area inside the Trident Lakehouse where raw/bronze files are stored in Ceph buckets without any metadata. Same storage, no context yet.

zones.name: Accumulation Zone
zones.description: Workshop area that turns Lake files into Iceberg tables and attaches Milvus explaining metadata + Redis sharing metadata. This is the step that promotes Lake content into Lakehouse content.

zones.name: Staging Zone
zones.description: Frequently used datasets are placed on shelves for fast pickup (Silver Iceberg + Redis hot partition cache).

zones.name: Delivery Zone
zones.description: Customer Desk receives user queries and either (a) looks up datasets via Milvus metadata or (b) picks from staging shelves, then hands data off to AI/HPC/HPDA/M&S workload docks.

entities.name: Customer Desk
entities.description: User search/request intake. Routes to Milvus metadata lookup or Staging shelf pickup.

entities.name: System Operator Desk
entities.description: System administrator console. Separate from Customer Desk.
